request.description: Performs complex signup process at once, including registering dummy payment method. Specify `email` and `password` for an operator which will be created on sandbox, `authKeyId` and `authKey` for a real operator on the production environment. An API Key and an API Token will be included in the response if successful. Use the API Key and the API Token to requests afterwards.

response.name: Email address, AuthKeyId, or AuthKey is not correct.

request.description: Retrieves a 'signup token' for registration confirmation. Please specify a pair of AuthKeyId and AuthKey of a SAM user on the production environment to check if the caller has a valid account on it.

response.name: Email address, AuthKeyId, or AuthKey is not correct.

request.description: Changes the shipping status to 'shipped' and gets ready the subscribers included in the order.
Populates Air stats for testing purpose. Inserted data are going to be automatically accumulated. It is not possible to put the data multiple times with the same timestamp.

response.name: Data with the same timestamp already exists.

request.description: Populates Beam stats for testing purpose. Inserted data are going to be automatically accumulated. It is not possible to put the data multiple times with the same timestamp.

response.name: Data with the same timestamp already exists.

item.name: Creates a new subscriber for sandbox

request.description: Creates a new subscriber for sandbox.
